2604.20511.title: CHASM: Unveiling Covert Advertisements on Chinese Social Media
2604.20511.paper_summary: Current benchmarks for evaluating large language models (LLMs) in social media moderation completely overlook a serious threat: covert advertisements, which disguise themselves as regular posts to deceive and mislead consumers into making purchases, leading to significant ethical and legal concerns. In this paper, we present the CHASM, a first-of-its-kind dataset designed to evaluate the capability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) in detecting covert advertisements on social media. CHASM is a high-quality, anonymized, manually curated dataset consisting of 4,992 instances, based on real-world scenarios from the Chinese social media platform Rednote. The dataset was collected and annotated under strict privacy protection and quality control protocols. It includes many product experience sharing posts that closely resemble covert advertisements, making the dataset particularly challenging.The results show that under both zero-shot and in-context learning settings, none of the current MLLMs are sufficiently reliable for detecting covert advertisements.Our further experiments revealed that fine-tuning open-source MLLMs on our dataset yielded noticeable performance gains. However, significant challenges persist, such as detecting subtle cues in comments and differences in visual and textual structures.We provide in-depth error analysis and outline future research directions. We hope our study can serve as a call for the research community and platform moderators to develop more precise defenses against this emerging threat.
2604.20511.paper_summary_zh: 目前用於評估社交媒體內容管理的大型語言模型（LLMs）的基準完全忽視了一個嚴重的威脅：隱蔽廣告，這些廣告偽裝成普通帖子，以欺騙和誤導消費者進行購買，從而引發重大的倫理和法律問題。在本文中，我們提出了CHASM，這是一個首創的數據集，旨在評估多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在檢測社交媒體上隱蔽廣告的能力。CHASM是一個高質量、匿名化、手動策劃的數據集，包含4,992個實例，基於中國社交媒體平台Rednote的真實場景。該數據集是在嚴格的隱私保護和質量控制協議下收集和註釋的。它包括許多產品體驗分享帖子，這些帖子與隱蔽廣告非常相似，使得該數據集特別具有挑戰性。結果顯示，在零樣本和上下文學習設置下，目前的MLLMs在檢測隱蔽廣告方面都不夠可靠。我們的進一步實驗顯示，在我們的數據集上微調開源MLLMs可以顯著提高性能。然而，仍然存在重大挑戰，例如檢測評論中的微妙線索以及視覺和文本結構的差異。我們提供了深入的錯誤分析並概述了未來的研究方向。我們希望我們的研究能夠呼籲研究社群和平台管理者開發更精確的防禦措施，以應對這一新興威脅。
2604.20511.author: Jingyi Zheng et.al.
2604.20511.authors: Jingyi Zheng, Tianyi Hu, Yule Liu, Zhen Sun, Zongmin Zhang, Zifan Peng, Wenhan Dong, Xinlei He
